Article.ArticleTitle: Exploring associations between energetic and anthropometric characteristics with front crawl technique in young male swimmers using IMU sensors: a preliminary study.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Water Sports, Faculty of Physical Education and Sport, University of Physical Culture in Krakow, al. Jana Pawla II 78, Krakow, 31-521, Poland. lukasz.wadrzyk@awf.krakow.pl.
